title: 7 Best Constant Contact Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best Constant Contact alternatives. Compare free and paid email marketing tools for small businesses, nonprofits, and creators.
intro: While Constant Contact offers solid email marketing features, many users seek alternatives with better pricing, more advanced automation, or specialized features for their business type. Whether you're looking for a free tier, superior customer support, or industry-specific tools, there are several compelling options that match or exceed Constant Contact's capabilities at competitive price points.
why_switch: Better pricing models with generous free tiers for growing businesses
Superior customer reviews and satisfaction ratings on independent platforms
More advanced automation, CRM, and analytics features included at lower tiers

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp offers a completely free tier for up to 500 contacts with unlimited email sends, making it ideal if you want to start at zero cost. Its intuitive drag-and-drop editor and extensive automation features rival Constant Contact while remaining accessible to nonprofits and local businesses.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite starts at just $9/month and includes 1,000 free subscribers, making it significantly cheaper than Constant Contact's $12 entry point. It combines affordability with professional features like landing pages, pop-ups, and e-commerce integrations that rival much more expensive platforms.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit's free tier supports up to 1,000 subscribers and includes powerful visual automation and subscriber taggingŚperfect for creators who need more than Constant Contact's standard templates. Its focus on creator-specific features like commerce and sequences makes it ideal for content-driven businesses.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv offers the most generous free tier with 2,500 subscribers and includes built-in newsletter monetization and a referral program for growth. It's purpose-built for publishers and significantly outperforms Constant Contact in Trustpilot ratings (4.4 vs. 2.8), making it the better choice for media-focused businesses.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign integrates email, CRM, and advanced automation into one platform at a similar starting price ($15), but offers significantly more powerful lead scoring and dynamic content capabilities. It's the best choice if you need enterprise-grade automation without upgrading to a separate CRM tool.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo's free tier allows unlimited contacts (up to 100,000 emails/day), an industry-leading limit that dwarfs Constant Contact's paid offerings. It's the clear winner if you need SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat alongside email, providing more integrated channels at a lower cost.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: Online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse uniquely combines email marketing with native webinar hosting and online course creation tools, features Constant Contact lacks. For entrepreneurs selling digital products, it eliminates the need for multiple platform subscriptions while starting at an accessible $19/month.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with unlimited contacts (up to 100,000 emails/day) and includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat. If you prefer a more traditional email marketing approach, Mailchimp's free tier supports 500 contacts with unlimited sends, while Beehiiv allows 2,500 free subscribers with monetization features built-in.

faq.q: What is the best Constant Contact alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the best overall value for small businesses, starting at just $9/month with 1,000 free subscribers and including landing pages, pop-ups, and e-commerce integrations. If you need CRM functionality, ActiveCampaign offers more advanced automation and lead scoring at a similar $15 entry price.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite starts at $9/month versus Constant Contact's $12 minimum, and several platforms offer free tiers to start without spending anything. Brevo is completely free for up to 100,000 emails per day, making it the cheapest option if your needs fit their free tier limits.
